MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. VIVIAN LEUNG LERCHE, TEL. NO. 1-415-680-5731 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC'S Motion To Vacate Judgment is Granted, no opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Entry of Judgment. No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Brandon Tang, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATION, LLC.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant(s) NEIL AGGARWAL.
Declaration of Maria Marin pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Association, LLC., and against Defendant Neil Aggarwal as follows:
Principal $5,064.34
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $280.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $5,344.34
Judgment signed in open court.
